heading: Guidance and training by FEMA on coordination of emergency response plans
label: 5196g Guidance and training by FEMA on coordination of emergency response plans
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Disaster Recovery Reform Act of 2018 and as part of the FAA Reauthorization Act of 2018, and not as part of the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definition of “Administrator” and “State” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 1203 of Pub. L. 115–254section 5122 of this title

children.text: Providing a list of equipment required in the event a hazardous substance is released into the environment.
Outlining the health risks associated with exposure to hazardous substances to improve treatment response.
Publishing best practices for mitigating further danger to communities from hazardous substances.

children.heading: Implementation
children.label: b Implementation
children.text: The requirement of subsection (a) shall be implemented not later than 180 days after .October 5, 2018
